headline: International Paper Streamlines Operations Through Facility Closures
summary: IP plans to close multiple facilities by Q3 2026 as it streamlines operations to improve costs, expand capacity and serve customers.

raw.headline: International Paper Streamlines Operations Through Facility Closures
raw.summary: IP plans to close multiple facilities by Q3 2026 as it streamlines operations to improve costs, expand capacity and serve customers.

headline: Why Dow Stock Is on an Epic Losing Streak
summary: Shares of commodity chemical producer  Dow  have had a rough time lately.  Dow stock was down 1.5% in early trading on Tuesday at $27.51, on pace for its 11th consecutive drop.  Today’s price would be the lowest close since Jan. 29, 2026, when it closed at $27.16, according to Dow Jones Market Data.

headline: Methanex to Indefinitely Idle Titan Plant as Gas Supply Contract Fails
summary: MEOH will indefinitely idle its Titan methanol plant in Trinidad after failing to secure a new gas contract, while preserving restart optionality.

raw.headline: Methanex to Indefinitely Idle Titan Plant as Gas Supply Contract Fails
raw.summary: MEOH will indefinitely idle its Titan methanol plant in Trinidad after failing to secure a new gas contract, while preserving restart optionality.

headline: ATI Shares Surge 72% YTD: Can the Stock Continue Its Momentum?
summary: ATI's 72% YTD rally is fueled by aerospace, defense and specialty energy demand, capacity investments, earnings beats and a stronger growth outlook.

headline: B of A Securities Maintains Underperform on Dow, Lowers Price Target to $29
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Matthew DeYoe   maintains Dow (NYSE:DOW) with a Underperform and lowers the price target from $35 to $29.

headline: Dow (DOW) Stock After Recent Slide Is There A Pricing Opportunity Now
summary: If you are wondering whether Dow is priced attractively or not, the stock's recent moves and valuation checks offer plenty to think about. Dow closed at US$27.92, with the share price up 15.0% year to date and 11.0% over the past year, even though it declined 9.3% in the last week and fell 17.3% over the past month. Those short term declines sit against a longer track record where the stock fell 38.2% over three years and declined 42.3% over five years. This mixed history can shape how...
